766.reason: [Using index-2 may not point to the correct line number of the last non-terminal before the missing semicolon; should use a more accurate token reference]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Using index-2 may not point to the correct line number of the last non-terminal before the missing semicolon; should use a more accurate token reference]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect line number calculation for missing semicolon error; should use the line number of the last token that was successfully parsed in the current statement, not index-2 which may not correspond to the correct non-terminal]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Using index - 2 may not point to the correct line number of the last non-terminal before the missing semicolon; should use a more accurate token reference]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [The error line number should correspond to the line of the last non-terminal before the missing semicolon, but using index-2 may not correctly identify this line as it assumes a fixed token distance]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Using index - 2 may not point to the correct line number of the last non-terminal before the missing semicolon; it should reference the line number of the last successfully parsed token in the current construct]

804.reason: [Using index-2 is unreliable for determining the correct error line number for missing ')'; should reference the line number of the corresponding '(' or last parsed expression]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Using index-2 is unreliable for determining the correct error line number for missing ')'; should reference the line number of the corresponding '(' or last parsed expression]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect line number calculation for missing right parenthesis error; should use the line number of the function call, condition, or expression being processed, not index-2 which may not correspond to the relevant non-terminal]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Using index - 2 is unreliable for determining the correct error line number for missing ')'; should track the line number of the corresponding '(' or the last parsed non-terminal]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [The error line number should correspond to the line where the last non-terminal before the missing right parenthesis is located, but index-2 may not accurately represent this position]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Using index - 2 is unreliable for determining the correct error line; it should be the line number of the last token that was part of the current syntactic construct before the expected ')']
